PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT(YEAR(?startDate) AS ?firstElectionYear) WHERE {
  ?representative wdt:P39 wd:Q21971205 ; wdt:P551 wd:Q54444 ; p:P39 ?positionStatement ; wdt:P2107 ?business .
  ?positionStatement pq:P580 ?startDate .
  ?business rdfs:label ?businessLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?businessLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(?businessLabel) , "slot car|racing facility|car racing"))
}
ORDER BY ASC(?startDate)
LIMIT 1
